# Bft Progress Council MCP

> BFT Progress Council MCP — 5-voter Byzantine council halts agentic loops when no real progress is...

`bft-progress-council-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install bft-progress-council-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx bft-progress-council-mcp
```

## Tools

- `start_session`
- `record_action`
- `council_vote`
- `get_session_summary`
- `estimate_tokens_saved`
- `list_voters` — List the 5 council voters and what each detects.

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/bft-progress-council-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/bft-progress-council-mcp/
- MEOK AI Labs: https://meok.ai
- Council of AI: https://councilof.ai
